banner: DESIGN-BASIS / SYNTHETIC SNAPSHOT — DERIVED FROM DRAWINGS, NOT OBSERVED FIELD DATA. No West End enteliWEB field capture exists; every value is tagged V (verbatim drawing setpoint), DERIVED (computed from the SOO at the stated scenario), or ILLUS (illustrative live magnitude, non-authoritative).
scenario: Occupied, summer cooling design day (OA 95F DB / 78F WB), all systems in Auto, steady state. Schedule: weekday 8:30AM-3:15PM occupied. Existing geothermal/condenser-water loop in service.

provenance_legend.V: verbatim setpoint/design value from a drawing (cited)
provenance_legend.DERIVED: deterministically computed from the SOO at the stated scenario
provenance_legend.ILLUS: illustrative placeholder where the drawing fixes neither setpoint nor live value (non-authoritative)

vrf_note: VRF is standalone (factory programming + iTouch). Only the BAS-visible monitor/alarm points appear here; all compressor/refrigerant/EEV/defrost/indoor-fan logic is factory controlled, NOT in BAS.
